title: Smoltek Hydrogen Enables More Cost-Effective Green Hydrogen Production
content: Smoltekâ€™s Porous Transport Electrode (PTE) technology increases available surface area 30-fold â€” while using up to 95% less iridium.The design of Smoltek Hydrogenâ€™s PTE for PEMWE (PEM electrolyzers) involves a unique approach where we have developed an enhanced surface area that facilitates us to deposit ultra-low levels of Iridium catalyst structures. The designed electrodes improve the iridium utilization ratio during water electrolysis, which will eventually enhance the electrolyzer performance and durability.
author: Analysts Account
